items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-81 northbound between .5 miles south of Exit : REST AREA TRAILERS TRUCKS/WEIGH STATTION and .8 miles north of Exit : REST AREA TRAILERS TRUCKS/WEIGH STATTION. There is a lane restriction.
